$comment: The placeholder capability (stage 4c-lite): ONE minimal internal data op proving the invoke-through-gates path end to end. The real starter capability set ships with the future library pursuit — do not grow this file; author real capabilities through DevShell.
name: Add note
description: Write one note into the app audit log (tenant-scoped in the multi variant, D-T80). The seed capability a provisioned app invokes through Gate 1/2.
